title: The Last of Us Part I
description: The Last of Us Part I is a complete remake of Naughty Dog's critically acclaimed post-apocalyptic masterpiece. Players follow Joel, a hardened survivor, as he escorts Ellie across a devastated United States in hopes of finding a cure for the Cordyceps infection. Featuring rebuilt visuals, advanced character rendering, realistic physics, and enhanced accessibility, the PC version supports DLSS, AMD FSR, ultrawide resolutions, and modern rendering technologies.
benchmarkNotes: Excellent texture quality and character rendering
Stable frame pacing after major PC patches
One of the finest cinematic story-driven experiences
